PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOGGS, DOUGLAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALAZAR, LOIS JEANNE PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO AN ORDER (A) OF REPLEVIN FOR THE IMMEDIATE RETURN, FROM THE DEFENDANT, OF PHYSICAL POSSESSION AND FULL TITLE AND OWNERSHIP OF THE 2005 CORVETTE AUTOMOBILE; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS
